title: osmanthus cooperi
intro: Osmanthus cooperi, also known as Cooper's osmanthus or Cooper's tea olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Osmanthus cooperi include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional Chinese medicine, Osmanthus cooperi is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and dried flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
